name: Popmotion
description: Functional reactive animation toolkit — spring, keyframe and decay physics for numbers, colours, and strings. The engine inside Framer Motion. 4.5kb. Physics-first value interpolation.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/popmotion@11.0.5/dist/popmotion.global.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof popmotion === 'undefined') return;
  var spring = popmotion.spring;
  var animate = popmotion.animate;

  // Spring physics on card hover
  document.querySelectorAll('.spring-card').forEach(function(card) {
    var currentScale = 1;
    card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      animate({
        from: currentScale,
        to: 1.04,
        type: spring,
        stiffness: 400,
        damping: 20,
        onUpdate: function(v) {
          currentScale = v;
          card.style.transform = 'scale(' + v + ')';
        }
      });
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      animate({
        from: currentScale,
        to: 1,
        type: spring,
        stiffness: 300,
        damping: 25,
        onUpdate: function(v) {
          currentScale = v;
          card.style.transform = 'scale(' + v + ')';
        }
      });
    });
  });
})();
</script>
